summary: Matrix mix delivers good sound quality and captures a smoking performance.
review: Both reviewers gave the recording four stars, describing the show simply as “smoking” and “bitchin’,” which signals strong enthusiasm for the music. No specific comments about the audio were made, but the matrix source suggests a balanced blend of board and audience sound that is generally listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: Two brief but uniformly positive reviews (4‑star) indicate an enjoyable performance; lack of detail on recording leaves some uncertainty, yielding a solid but not exceptional rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on technical aspects; the matrix source is assumed to provide decent clarity and balance.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No details provided in reviews regarding set structure or pacing.
